designSystem.name: Hebats Dashboard Style
designSystem.summary: Warm, soft-pastel productivity dashboard. Light neutral canvas hosts floating white/tinted cards with heavy corner radii, generous whitespace, friendly illustrated icons/emoji, and one confident accent color (warm orange) used sparingly for CTAs and highlights. Feels calm, approachable, 'morning routine' friendly rather than corporate/dense.

layout.structure: Multi-column dashboard grid inside a browser-chrome frame (macOS traffic-light dots, breadcrumb nav, search). Left: greeting + actions + calendar widget + promo card. Center: stacked widgets (Weather, Should Do, Running Competition). Right-center: Today's Todos list. Far right: stacked promo/integration cards + Analytics module spanning bottom.
layout.grid: 4-column asymmetric grid; columns vary in width (narrow sidebar ~260px, wider center/content columns ~330-450px). Cards align to a consistent baseline grid with equal gutter spacing.
layout.containerStyle: Entire dashboard sits in a rounded outer frame (browser window) with a subtle border, floating on an off-white page background.
layout.whitespace: Generous — cards never touch; consistent ~20-24px gutters between columns and ~16-20px between stacked cards.
layout.alignment: Left-aligned text blocks throughout; icons/avatars align to top-left of their card; action buttons/links (e.g. 'View Details') align top-right of card headers.

colorPalette.approach: Mostly neutral/desaturated base with each card given its own soft pastel tint to differentiate function, plus a single warm accent for primary actions and emphasis.

accentPrimary.usage: Primary buttons ('+ New Habits'), active calendar date highlight, progress bar fill, key data emphasis (e.g. selected chart bar), small accent icons

textColors.linkOrAction: #1F1F1F with low-emphasis gray for 'View Details' links

colorPalette.borderAndDividers: Very light gray (#ECECEA), 1px hairlines, used sparingly between list rows
colorPalette.principle: Never more than one saturated accent per view; pastel tints denote category/context, not hierarchy; status conveyed through soft color (green check = done) not harsh red/green pairs

typography.fontFamily: Geometric/humanist sans-serif (e.g. 'General Sans', 'Inter', 'Plus Jakarta Sans', or similar rounded-terminal sans)

scale.metaText: 12-13px / Regular / muted gray — timestamps, locations, subtitles
scale.microLabel: 11-12px / Medium / uppercase-or-caps optional — small badges, stat labels

typography.lineHeight: Relaxed (1.4-1.5) for readability and airy feel
typography.letterSpacing: Default to slightly tight on large headings, normal elsewhere
typography.principle: Strong weight contrast between bold titles and light/regular meta text creates hierarchy without needing many colors

borderRadius.buttons: 999px / fully pill-shaped for primary CTAs, 12-16px for secondary rectangular buttons
borderRadius.iconContainers: 12-16px rounded squares for list-item icon badges

spacingAndSizing.iconSizing: Small functional icons ~16px; list-item illustrated icon badges ~36-40px square; weather/illustration art scaled larger (~120-150px) as decorative focal points

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped, solid warm-orange fill, white bold label, centered icon+text (e.g. '+ New Habits'), medium height (~44px), no visible border, soft drop shadow optional
buttons.secondary: Pill or rounded-rectangle, white/transparent fill, thin neutral border, dark text, same height as primary for visual pairing (e.g. 'Browse Popular Habits')
buttons.darkCTA: Black/near-black pill button on colored cards for contrast (e.g. 'Link Account', 'View')

cards.general: White or pastel-tinted rounded rectangles, no harsh borders — separation achieved via subtle shadow or background contrast against page. Header row = title (bold, dark) + small muted action link ('View Details') aligned right.
cards.elevation: Soft, diffuse drop shadows (low opacity, large blur, small offset) — never sharp/hard shadows
cards.illustrationCards: Feature a friendly flat-illustration (umbrella in rain, map pin, character at laptop) anchored bottom or center-right of the card to add warmth/personality

calendar.style: Minimal grid of circular date cells; current/selected date = solid orange filled circle with white text; date with an event = thin orange ring outline; other dates = plain text on transparent background; month nav via small chevron buttons; small percentage delta caption below ('+3,2% from last month')

listItems.todoRow: Horizontal row: rounded-square illustrated/emoji icon badge (left) + title (bold) and meta line with small clock/location icons (below) + checkbox/checkmark indicator (right). Completed items show a filled green circular checkmark; pending items show an empty light-gray rounded checkbox. Completed item titles may render in muted/strikethrough-light style.
listItems.metaIcons: Inline small clock and pin/location glyphs preceding meta text, consistent muted-gray color

badgesAndChips.style: Small rounded-rectangle or pill chips with soft background tint and bold percentage/number (e.g. green 'Positive Habits +58,2%' chip with emoji)
badgesAndChips.usage: Surface quick stats inline within larger analytic modules

charts.style: Minimal vertical bar chart, thin rounded-top bars, neutral light-gray bars for inactive categories and a single solid orange bar to highlight the top/selected category, small emoji or icon floating above the highlighted bar, axis labels in small muted gray text, light dropdown filter ('December ▾') and search input in card header

promoCards.style: Bold single-color or dark-illustration cards used for upsells/integrations (Spotify connect, 'More Integrations', 'Habits Wrapped 2023') — large bold heading, short supporting copy, single dark or white pill CTA button, optional decorative icon/illustration/confetti graphic

avatarAndProfileElements.style: Friendly flat-illustrated character avatars (e.g. person at laptop) used in promotional sidebar card to humanize the product

navigationChrome.style: macOS-style traffic-light window dots top-left, breadcrumb-style page title ('Dashboard / Schedule') with muted secondary segment, centered search icon, right-aligned cluster of small utility icons and circular profile avatar

iconographyAndIllustration.style: Mix of emoji (🌤️🏋️🛒📖🏊) for personality/quick-scan recognition and simple line icons (clock, pin, chevron, search) for UI chrome. Larger decorative illustrations are flat, soft-colored, slightly whimsical (umbrella+rain scene, map with pin, character at laptop, gift box with confetti).
iconographyAndIllustration.principle: Icons reinforce content meaning instantly (visual shorthand for habit categories); illustrations add emotional warmth to otherwise data-dense areas

motionAndState.hoverAndFocus: Assume subtle elevation/scale increase on interactive cards and buttons; checkboxes animate fill on completion (light gray → green filled circle with check)
motionAndState.emphasisPattern: Use color (orange highlight) and scale, never harsh borders, to indicate selection/active state — e.g. selected calendar date, active chart bar

designPrinciples: One dominant accent color (warm orange) — everything else stays neutral or pastel so the accent always reads as 'primary action / important'.
Generous rounded corners and soft shadows everywhere — nothing sharp, nothing flat-bordered; the whole UI should feel 'pillowy' and touchable.
Whitespace over density — let cards breathe; never cram more than a handful of data points per module.
Personality through illustration/emoji, not through color noise — keep the palette calm and let friendly graphics carry warmth.
Clear two-tier text hierarchy (bold dark headings vs. muted gray meta) so screens stay scannable without heavy color-coding.
Consistent card anatomy — every module has a bold title + secondary 'View Details' link in the same top-row position, training the eye to scan predictably.

Status communicated softly — green circular checks for completion, orange rings/fills for 'today/active', muted gray for 'inactive/future' — avoiding alarming reds except for a single intentional coral promo accent.
designSystem.applicationGuidance: When generating new screens or components for this app: default to a light warm-gray page background with white or pastel-tinted cards (radius 20px+), reserve solid warm-orange fills for the single most important action per view, pair bold dark sans-serif headings with smaller muted-gray meta text, illustrate list items with rounded-square emoji/icon badges, and finish empty corners or promo slots with friendly flat illustrations rather than stock imagery or dense data tables.
